name: Fleet Technician Offboarding Process
description: Complete fleet-related offboarding process for departing technicians

steps.title: Process Vehicle Return
steps.description: Handle return and inspection of assigned company vehicle

substeps.title: Inspect vehicle condition
substeps.description: Perform thorough inspection of returned vehicle condition

substeps.title: Collect keys and documents
substeps.description: Retrieve all keys, registration, and vehicle-related documents

substeps.title: Update fleet management system
substeps.description: Mark vehicle as returned and available for reassignment

steps.title: Retrieve Fleet Equipment
steps.description: Collect all fleet-issued equipment and tools

substeps.title: Inventory returned tools
substeps.description: Check all fleet-issued tools and equipment against inventory list

substeps.title: Assess equipment condition
substeps.description: Evaluate condition of returned equipment for damage or wear

substeps.title: Generate vehicle return report
substeps.description: Create detailed report of vehicle and equipment return

substeps.title: Update technician fleet record
substeps.description: Mark technician as no longer having fleet assignments
